name: gadd
description: Governed Autonomy skills for product, design, planning, decomposition, implementation, verification, closure handoffs, and GAPS process specification validation.

commands.purpose: Bootstrap GADD files and local ledger support in a target repository.
Read repo-local ledger state and report the next GADD command.
Normalize unclassified intake, including free-form prompts, and route a Work Item to implementation, SDD, PRD discovery, or a terminal state.
Gather PM-grade inputs, codebase facts, and sanitized readiness evidence before scoping.
Write PRD goals, non-goals, and initial constraints.
Fill product detail inside the approved scope.
Make the PRD testable and ready for engineering design review.
Approve exactly one PRD, SDD, or plan gate from repo-local ledger state.
Write the SDD and apply the ADR threshold.
Write the implementation plan and generated HTML review copy.
Create reviewable child Work Items from an approved plan when decomposition is needed.
Implement one ready Work Item with code, tests, docs impact, and evidence.
Verify one implemented Work Item is ready for human-approved closure.
Apply human-approved closure for one verified Work Item or a closeable parent roll-up.
Optionally archive closed GADD Work Item files after workflow closure.
Author or revise a GAPS process specification from an existing governed process.
Validate GAPS process specifications and implementation maps.

codex.install: Use $skill-installer with the canonical skill paths in this manifest.
